description_long: This is a modern, compact sofa with a visually striking red and white patterned upholstery. The sofa features a deep, wide seat with two large, loose back cushions and one seat cushion, all covered in the same textured fabric. The armrests are gently curved and rise to the same height as the backrest, creating a cozy, enclosed seating area. The sofa stands on four slender, dark-colored legs positioned at the corners, giving it a light and elevated appearance. The upholstery has a woven, quilted texture with an abstract, almost pixelated pattern. This piece would add a bold, contemporary touch to any urban park, sidewalk lounge, or neighborhood gathering space.
description: A compact, modern sofa with red and white patterned, quilted upholstery, featuring curved armrests and large, loose cushions. Supported by four slender, dark legs, it offers a cozy and stylish seating option.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, two large loose back cushions, and the curved armrests enclosing the seating area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's depth, the thickness of the cushions, and the gentle outward curve of the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, curved backrest and the consistent patterned upholstery wrapping around the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the sofa's depth, cushion thickness, and the armrest's profile.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose back cushions and one wide seat cushion, all uniform in size and covered in matching patterned fabric.
attribute_armrest_style: Curved, fully upholstered armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a smooth, continuous profile and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slender, straight legs positioned at the corners, likely made of dark-finished wood or metal, with an exposed and minimalist design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, continuous backrest that curves gently around the sides, with no visible tufting or segmentation, supporting two loose cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Abstract, quilted pattern in red and white with a woven texture, creating a visually dynamic and contemporary appearance.
